name: HYATT HOTELS CL. A DL-,01
summary: Hyatt Hotels Corporation operates as a global hospitality company, managing, franchising, owning, and developing a portfolio of hotel, resort, and residential properties. Headquartered in Chicago, Illinois, the company offers a variety of brands catering to different market segments. TICKER: Hyatt Hotels Corporation operates globally in the hospitality industry, managing, franchising, owning, and developing a diverse portfolio of hotel, resort, and residential properties.
